# Infinite Craft — Recipes Relevant to Our Type System

<!-- Generated by scripts/parse-infinite-craft.py -->
<!-- Source: https://github.com/kalinuska/infinite-craft-all-recipes -->

This table contains all Infinite Craft recipes where at least one element
maps to our type system (primaries, secondaries, tertiaries, augmenters,
or key intermediates like Lava, Steam, Storm, etc.).

**Our Type Mapping Key:**
- Primary: Fire, Earth, Water, Wind→Air
- Secondary: Metal (Fire+Earth), Plant (Earth+Water), Ice (Air+Water), Electric (Fire+Air)
- Tertiary: Radioactive, Cosmic, Poison, Sound, Crystal, Ghost, Heat, Magnetic
- Augmenters: Time, Space, Light, Dark
